title: 🔑 Install GitHub Token
description:
## What
Add a GitHub personal access token to the environment so Guard Dog (and other agents) get 5,000 req/hr instead of 60 req/hr on the GitHub API.

## Steps
1. Go to https://github.com/settings/tokens
2. Generate a new fine-grained personal access token
3. Scopes needed: `public_repo` (read-only) — no write access needed
4. Add to `~/.openclaw/.env`: `GITHUB_TOKEN=ghp_xxxxxxxxxxxx`
5. Verify: `node ~/.openclaw/workspace/agents/guard-dog/src/index.js test`

## Why
- Guard Dog's reputation checker queries GitHub for repo stars, security issues, archived status
- Unauthenticated limit is 60 req/hr — a batch scan of 30+ packages will hit this
- With token: 5,000 req/hr — effectively unlimited for our use case

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] GITHUB_TOKEN set in .env
- [ ] Guard Dog test shows GitHub checks passing
- [ ] Nightly cron scan completes without GitHub rate limit errors
